name: SearXNG
compose:
name: slashnode-searxng
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/searxng/searxng:2026.6.24-e3126b89e
    container_name: web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      SEARXNG_SECRET: ${secret.APP_SEED}
      SEARXNG_LIMITER: 'false'
    volumes:
      - web_data-config:/etc/searxng
      - web_data-cache:/var/cache/searxng
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8182:8080
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-config:
    name: slashnode-searxng_web_data-config
  web_data-cache:
    name: slashnode-searxng_web_data-cache
notes: Auto-converted from getumbrel/umbrel-apps (searxng). Review before shipping. Upstream: https://docs.searxng.org/.
